channel.title: RoboWire
channel.description: Practical robotics engineering guides and niche technical deep-dives

item.title: Kalman Filter for Robot State Estimation: A Practical Introduction
item.description: How the Kalman filter fuses noisy sensor data and motion models for robot state estimation, with the core equations and a worked example.

item.title: IMU Sensor Fusion Basics: Combining Accelerometer and Gyroscope Data
item.description: IMU sensor fusion basics explained: why raw accelerometer and gyroscope data drift, and how complementary and Kalman filters combine them for stable orientation.

item.title: Choosing a Battery for a Quadruped Robot: A Practical Sizing Guide
item.description: Learn how to size and choose a battery for a quadruped robot, covering chemistry, voltage, capacity, discharge rate, and mounting tradeoffs.

item.title: Servo vs Stepper vs BLDC Motor for Robotics: Choosing the Right Actuator
item.description: Compare servo, stepper, and BLDC motors for robotics: torque, precision, cost, and control complexity, with clear guidance on which to pick for your build.

item.title: Trajectory Planning for Robotic Arms: From Waypoints to Smooth Motion
item.description: Trajectory planning for robotic arms explained: joint-space vs Cartesian trajectories, trapezoidal and S-curve profiles, and how to avoid jerky motion.

item.title: Harmonic Drive vs Planetary Gearbox: Choosing the Right Reduction for a Robot Joint
item.description: Harmonic drive vs planetary gearbox for robot joints: how each works, backlash, torque density, stiffness and cost tradeoffs, with guidance on picking one.

item.title: SLAM Basics for Mobile Robots: How Robots Map and Localize at the Same Time
item.description: SLAM basics for mobile robots explained: why mapping and localization are solved together, the main algorithm families, and common pitfalls in real systems.

item.title: ROS2 Nodes and Topics Explained: How Robot Software Talks to Itself
item.description: ROS2 nodes and topics explained with real code: how publishers, subscribers, and the DDS middleware let robot software components communicate.

item.title: Inverse Kinematics Explained: How Robotic Arms Solve for Joint Angles
item.description: Inverse kinematics explained with math and code: how a robotic arm computes joint angles from a target end-effector position, plus common solving methods.

item.title: PID Controller Tuning for Robotic Arms: A Practical Guide
item.description: Learn how PID controller tuning works for robotic arm joints, with formulas, tuning methods, and practical fixes for overshoot, oscillation, and steady-state error.
